content_body: For 47 years, the Blue Ridge Mountain Arts Association has provided a true art experience through the bi-annual Arts in the Park festival located in Downtown Blue Ridge, GA! Whether you are visiting Memorial Day weekend or the second weekend in October, this art festival is fun for the whole family. Drawing in about 20,000 attendees annually, Arts in the Park offers a wide array of artists and food vendors. With over 170 artists, exhibitors, and vendor booths, visitors can enjoy a variety of arts and crafts, demonstrations, food, and more at Arts in the Park!
title: Arts in the Park
